item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 181230Z AUTO 23007KT 190V280 9999 FEW039 SCT052 BKN066 15/08 Q1016 TEMPO 4000 -SHRA BKN030TCU
🟡 TAF LFOT 181100Z 1812/1912 24008KT 9999 BKN036 BKN045 BKN052 TEMPO 1812/1818 4000 -SHRA BKN030TCU BECMG 1818/1821 18005KT TEMPO 1901/1910 4000 -RA PROB30 TEMPO 1910/1912 BKN012
